html:
2026-0275
2026-03-30232021FINBudget Implementation Act, 2021, No.1Order Fixing January 1, 2027 as the Day on Which Sections 141 and 142 of the Budget Implementation Act, 2021, No. 1 Come into Force Order fixing January 1, 2027 as the day on which sections 141 and 142 of the Budget Implementation Act, 2021, No. 1 comes into force in order to implement the framework for the unclaimed pension assets of people who cannot be located.N/A
subject: Order Fixing January 1, 2027 as the Day on Which Sections 141 and 142 of the Budget Implementation Act, 2021, No. 1 Come into Force
precis: Order fixing January 1, 2027 as the day on which sections 141 and 142 of the Budget Implementation Act, 2021, No. 1 comes into force in order to implement the framework for the unclaimed pension assets of people who cannot be located.
